bodyHtml:
Recent operator-action digest

Window: last 7 day(s) · scope=institute-diagnostician (editorial — sees all) Items: 12 · Forecasts emitted: 39 · Positions opened: 0

Each item below was extracted by the operator from a recent editor / QA / diagnostician report, routed to an analyst, and either completed or is mid-flight. Use this to - avoid re-asking questions another analyst already investigated - pick up contradictions noted by the editor and resolved by a peer - weight your own conclusions against fresh forecast evidence

2026-05-31 · [fact_correction] Fix Dell revenue and order metrics in Chinese version

IN_PROGRESS

Fix the error where 43.8亿美元 is used instead of 438亿美元 and separate $24.4B orders from $51.3B ending backlog, as identified in §5.

  • Status: in progress

2026-05-31 · [fact_correction] Correct electronics sector outflow description in §2

DONE

Correct the description of the electronics sector outflow on 5/15 in §2, ensuring the 36.16 billion RMB magnitude is visually represented in the charts (Section 5).

  • Outcome: mailbox=c4001b53-bc35-41e5-b0f3-f8722a82e8fb not found (treat as closed)

2026-05-30 · [research_task] 核查 NVDA 2026-08-26 财报日来源

IN_PROGRESS

核查 Wall Street Horizon 提供的 2026-08-26 财报日信息来源，因为本报告标记该信息为 [来源不明]。依据：Section V 催化剂时间线。

  • Status: in progress

2026-05-30 · [research_task] 关注 2026 年 Nasdaq-100 年度重构公告

IN_PROGRESS

关注 2026 年 Nasdaq-100 实际公告日与生效日，以评估其对 QQQ 成分、集中度与 NVDA 权重的影响。依据：Section V 催化．

  • Status: in progress

2026-05-30 · [research_task] 每月复核 QQQ 关键估值与权重指标

IN_PROGRESS

每月复核 NAV、折溢价、NVDA 权重 8.155968% 的变化，以及组合透视 PE 35.90x 的估值压力。依据：Section IV 投资期限说明。

  • Status: in progress

2026-05-30 · [research_task] 按季度复核 NVDA 核心业绩指标

IN_PROGRESS

按季度复核 Q2 FY2027 $91.0 billion 指引兑现、gross margin 74.9% 上下 5 0 basis points、Data Center 增速和 China Data Center compute 披露情况。依据：Section IV 投资期限说明。

  • Status: in progress

DONE · owner=chief-strategist · research discussion=Analyze correlation between AI earnings and high-beta innovation baske… (led by chief-strategist)

The report concludes that the AI earnings event lifted correlation across high-beta innovation baskets, which requires involvement from the chief-strategist or asset-allocator, rather than just a TMT handoff.

2026-05-30 · [research_task] Revise fiscal sustainability research discussion for pilot cities

DONE · owner=committee-chair · research discussion=Revise fiscal sustainability research discussion for pilot cities (led by committee-chair)

The research discussion needs revision due to a tenfold Sichuan allocation error (582亿元/58.2亿元), inaccessible sources, and a missing manufacturing operating-leverage bridge table.

  • Outcome: research discussion "Revise fiscal sustainability research discussion for pilot cities" → completed | cards=10 | last-card: 作为首席风控官（Chief Risk Officer），我已顺利完成对 500 亿元多资产母组合在三大共振冲击——(i) 四川城商行二级资本债不赎回久期跃迁、(ii) 红利板块 5% 7% 拥挤踩踏回撤、(iii) Q4 10.3 万亿天量到期债流动性挤压下的投资组合级最终风险审计，并将全部压力测试、参数化 VaR/CVaR 测算、对冲方案净有效性评估以及极端情况下的硬性减仓与流动性 contingency buffer 预备清单整理归档。 工作空间文件审计与重构说明 在执行任务前，我对工作空间进行了全…

  • Forecasts: 9 (0 positions); tickers: TF, CTD, NOTE, CCDC, 600941.SH, SHFE

2026-05-30 · [research_task] Analyze macro policy impact on RMB cash-flow squeeze

DONE · owner=china-macro · research discussion=Analyze macro policy impact on RMB cash-flow squeeze (led by china-macro)

Determine if macro policy (credit easing, local fiscal support, and FX management) can counteract the RMB cash-flow squeeze before the 2026 land-bidding season, as proposed in the 'Handoff' section.

  • Outcome: research discussion "Analyze macro policy impact on RMB cash-flow squeeze" → completed | cards=10 | last-card: 本报告片评估了两部制电价机制下火电 IPP 的盈利稳定性及其对防御性篮子的影响。结论显示，2026 年 50% 固定成本回收的容量电价虽提供了盈利底座，但无法抵消现货市场 15%-25% 的折价挤压及灵活性改造与新能源扩张带来的刚性资本开支。火电 IPP 呈现“有利润无现金流”特征，拖累防御性篮子股息率降至 4.28%，较银行红利基准仅余 48bps 安全边际。3.5 万亿轮动资金面临潜在收益率缩水风险。 | → 4 forecast(s) on REIT,FVOCI,LGFV, 0 position(s) op…

  • Forecasts: 4 (0 positions); tickers: REIT, FVOCI, LGFV
